# 15-EPUB Test Corpus

Synthesized fixtures exercising every edge case from `02-VALIDATION.md` section
"15-EPUB Test Corpus". Generated by `_build_corpus.dart` — run it to regenerate.

Cases 5 and 6 are scaled down (20 chapters / small synthetic images) to keep the
repo reasonable. The parser code paths they exercise are identical regardless of
scale.

## Corpus Index

| # | Filename | Edge Case | Source |
|---|----------|-----------|--------|
| 1 | `01-standard-epub3.epub` | Well-formed EPUB 3 baseline | Synthesized |
| 2 | `02-no-cover.epub` | No cover image in manifest | Synthesized |
| 3 | `03-no-author.epub` | No `<dc:creator>` element | Synthesized |
| 4 | `04-non-ascii-title.epub` | UTF-8 title "Les Misérables — Àéîöü" | Synthesized |
| 5 | `05-very-long.epub` | 20 chapters (scaled from >500) | Synthesized |
| 6 | `06-image-heavy.epub` | 5 chapters with 3 images each | Synthesized |
| 7 | `07-tables.epub` | Table markup in chapter content | Synthesized |
| 8 | `08-footnotes.epub` | `<aside epub:type="footnote">` and `note` | Synthesized |
| 9 | `09-blockquotes-lists.epub` | Blockquotes + ordered/unordered lists | Synthesized |
| 10 | `10-malformed-xhtml.epub` | Unclosed tags, invalid nesting | Synthesized |
| 11 | `11-epub2.epub` | EPUB 2 format with NCX TOC | Synthesized |
| 12 | `12-spine-reordering.epub` | Non-sequential spine order (3, 1, 2) | Synthesized |
| 13 | `13-drm-protected.epub` | `META-INF/encryption.xml` present | Synthesized |
| 14 | `14-corrupt-zip.epub` | Truncated to 50% — invalid zip | Synthesized from #1 |
| 15 | `15-multi-cover.epub` | Two cover image candidates | Synthesized |

All files are synthesized from the EPUB spec structure. None contain copyrighted
content. Regenerate with: `dart run test/fixtures/epub/corpus/_build_corpus.dart`
